programme.title: Trust No 1

programme.title: A Life Lived

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Parwana
programme.desc: Parwana spends his days brightening the lives of the downtrodden with a series of odd jobs. Just as Parwana falls in love and marries the girl of his dreams, a group of vicious criminals label him a traitor and Parwana is thrown behind bars. Despite the mafia's best attempts to permanently silent Parwana as he languishes in jail, the daring hero escapes and sets out on a mission to clear his name and expose the real criminals.

programme.title: Joshila Janbaz

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hai Hum
programme.desc: Living in Mumbai, Rahul and Karan dream of living luxurious lives despite their meagre salaries. When they get evicted from their apartment for not paying the rent, they hunt for rich girlfriends

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: The Film follows four women from different backgrounds in India as they unite to fight against misogyny and violence in their society. Forced marriage, domestic abuse, and honor killings are just some of the struggles they face. Through their determination, they discover the strength of the human spirit, inspiring others to join their fight for justice. With a powerful cast and storyline, sheds light on important social issues and the fight for women's rights. Will these women succeed in creating a better future for themselves and future generations?

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents the Music & Lyrics Special in celebration of its 4th anniversary! And the second guest of the special trilogy is singer-songwriter JEONGMILLA. JEONGMILLA is known for her delicate poetic depictions of everyday life combined with heartwarming folk sounds. Interestingly enough she started off her career through fine arts after graduating from the prestigious Korea National University of Arts. And she says music and art are both important to her in different ways. In October last year JEONGMILLA released her third full-length album CheongPa Sonata. Inspired by the neighborhood she lives in Cheongpa-dong she delicately painted the quotidian scenes of the area with her personal stories. Since its release the album has been highly recommended by critics on various music charts and with this album she won three trophies at the 2021 Korean Music Awards -- Best Song - Folk Best Album - Folk and Best Album of the Year. In this episode JEONGMILLA performs Stars Departing from Seoul Station Old Town Journal During Troubled Times and Wandering. Tune in to I'm LIVE and explore her poetic artistic world!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents the Music & Lyrics Special in celebration of its 4th anniversary! And the last guest of the special trilogy is the super-talented sibling duo AKMU. The two burst into the K-pop scene in 2013 through the competition program K-Pop Star Season 2 and pleasantly surprised the public with their unrefined pure musicality. After being crowned the winners of the season they made their official debut in 2014 with the album PLAY. The elder brother LEE CHANHYUK is known for his exceptional songwriting skills and the younger sister LEE SUHYUN is famous for her crystal clear voice and together they exude a great synergy that makes them one-of-a-kind in the highly competitive K-pop scene. Then in 2015 the duo won the Best Pop Album at the prestigious Korean Music Awards and once again proved that they enjoy both critical acclaim and commercial appeal. They are on the 7th year of their debut and still touch listeners with their creative interpretations of everyday life stories. In this episode AKMU performs ALIEN DINOSAUR How Can I Love The Heartbreak You're The One I Love LAST GOODBYE and GIVE LOVE to showcase the lyrical beauty of their music. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these two talented siblings!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the band SORAN! SORAN is one of Korea's top-notch bands composed of vocalist Ko Young-bae bassist Seo Myeon-ho guitarist Lee Tae-wook and drummer Pyeon Yu-il. Unlike what their band name means disturbance in English they offer lively poppy tunes that are relaxing and pleasing to the ears and have gained a steady following in the indie scene since their debut in 2009. Also known for their warm-hearted lyrics and their flawless performances the quartet never fails to get listeners in a good mood. Recently the four dropped their new mini-album Beloved and also held a free online concert titled Perfect Day 0 : Light Steps via YouTube providing a moment of refreshment to everyone around the world. In this episode SORAN performs Be with me the lead single from their new release Don't Lose Weight Ricotta Cheese Salad Confession Of Love and Our Journey. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these four outstanding musicians!

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Comedy Night with Kapil- Farah Khan and Abhishek Bachchan
programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.title: Khatra Khatra Khatra- Ep 93
programme.desc: Khatra Khatra Khatra is a comedy-reality show featuring Bharti Singh, Harsh Limbachiyaa, Punit Pathak, and others from Khatron Ke Khiladi. The show focuses on performing funny, embarrassing dares and playing pranks on each other, with losers facing humiliating punishments.

programme.title: Comedy Night with Kapil- Booman Irani and Farha Khan
programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.title: Comedy Night Bachao-Sohail Khan
programme.desc: the show is known for its format where celebrity guests are subjected to harsh, tongue-in-cheek jokes and "roasted" by a team of comedians, including Krushna Abhishek, Bharti Singh, and Sudesh Lehri.

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Extra Ordinary
programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Medical Top Team
programme.desc: Follows the journey of creating Korea's best multidisciplinary medical team and the stories of doctors inside. Characters who have different hurts and dilemmas struggle as they get to work together and gradually learn that healing a person is healing oneself.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Ten Me
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.3
programme.desc: Under Director Ma's guidance, Jae Hee undergoes special training to become Miss Korea, satisfying Director Ma with her excellent skills. Oh Ji Young and Kim Hyung Joon decide to participate in the Miss Korea pageant with different motives, first preparing for the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant'. Director Ma attends the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant' as a judge, where Ji Young is scheduled to compete.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.4
programme.desc: Yoon offers Ji Young to be her 'sponsor', and Ji Young leaves in indignation and a sense of betrayal towards Hyung Joon. Teacher Jung tries to get money from Hyung Joon's mother but is flustered by her formidable demeanor. After many twists and turns, Ji Young steps onto the stage for the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant'.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.5
programme.desc: Ji Young leaves the 'Mandarin Lady Pageant' venue holding Director Ma's hand, and Teacher Jung tries to stop Director Ma. However, Director Ma firmly takes Ji Young and leaves the venue. Ji Young quits her department store job and begins training with Jae Hee and Director Ma's other candidates.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.6
programme.desc: Ji Young's family opposes her participation in 'Miss Korea'. Director Ma calmly begins to persuade the family. However, when the topic of 'breast augmentation surgery' comes up, the family and Hyung Joon strongly oppose it even more. Teacher Jung secretly takes samples of ViVi Cream to Kim Kang Shik of BaDa Cosmetics to negotiate.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.7
programme.desc: Ji Young, along with the ViVi Cosmetics members including Hyung Joon, begins serious 'Miss Korea' training. Meanwhile, Director Ma and Director Yang are surprised by the news that the Miss Korea pageant might not be held due to the IMF crisis.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.8
programme.desc: After much struggle, Ji Young competes in the Miss Korea Seoul preliminaries and does her best, but feels overwhelmed by the offensives from Queen Beauty Salon and Seri Beauty Salon. Ji Young and the ViVi Cosmetics members go through a tense preliminary judging process. Meanwhile, Ji Young's family, realizing she went ahead with the Miss Korea pageant, appears at the preliminary venue and tries to forcibly take Ji Young away.

Baloo is kept hostage, forced to massage the monkey tyrant, while Mowgli follows the bird to return the gem as ransom for his bear friend. Mowgli succeeds and the pair of them even gets to enjoy the lavishly fruit-supplied party.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Invention Story
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster merge into Robo and set a trap for a rogue UFO that' s abducted baby cars from the beach.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Time to merge! A " ghost" has stolen cakes from the cake-eating competition, Rodeo and Booster get ready to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to catch Zitron after he steals Billy' s pipes. Matilda the Police Car helps them.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Off-Road Travel TV
programme.desc: Overlanding in $150,000 Jeep off-road trailer maintenance ATV and UTV transport tips.

programme.title: Off-Road Travel TV

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark and George bust out the welders and rebuild the body for the deadest 1971 'Cuda they've ever encountered in the history of GYC.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The finishing of a 1969 GTX sparks the tale of its shaky restoration leading up to its delivery. This is only the latest of five previously-restored GTXs that the crew has brought back from the dead.

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider
programme.desc: It's semi final time for The Ultimate Rider contestants and, after seven weeks away from family and friends, tensions run high and the competition gets fierce!

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider
programme.desc: It's D-Day. After eight grueling weeks of competition, one very talented rookie will stand atop the podium and take the crown and a $20,000 prize and a dream contract with Team Honda Racing.

programme.title: Born To
programme.desc: Kiara Fontanesi has an impressive trophy cabinet. She is the 5 times winner of the Women Motocross World Championship, winning 4 of those years in succession.

programme.title: MTB Heroes
programme.desc: A German MTB legend decides to build a van and travel all the way down to Morocco to explore and ride the great Atlas mountains.

programme.title: MTB Heroes
programme.desc: We meet with a Spanish MTB pro rider who decided to create his own company in order to build the most exclusive and unique carbon bikes.

programme.title: MTB Heroes
programme.desc: We travel to Bali - Indonesia to meet an MTB pro rider who decided to start a new life dividing his time between surfing and riding active volcanos.

programme.title: Inside Moto
programme.desc: We reveal how Maverick & Alvaro face the loneliness of being Champions: Maverick lets go of family support while for Alvaro Bautista, family is the key.

programme.title: Inside Moto
programme.desc: We discover the relationship between Brad and Darryn Binder, 2 brothers who race against each other on motorcycle tracks around the world.

programme.title: Inside Moto
programme.desc: Sacrifices are found on the path to success: from Yonny Hernandez's self-exile, to the serious injuries that Doctor Villamor has to treat.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga
programme.desc: It's all or nothing as underdog Tom Liu drives himself to the brink in a heart-stopping Ultra 4 race.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: We took the Ferrari 458 Italia for a spring ride around Lake Starnberg. Also: a test drive of BMW's 6 series convertible at the Table Mountain in South Africa. And: the Chevrolet Orlando family van.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: Audi built only 333 units of its GT model. We tested the everyday use compatibility of the R8 GT. In addition: the Mazda MX5, the most popular roadster in the world. And: the Mercedes-AMG GT3.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: More efficiency, less weight and more sportiness is what Audi promotes in order to win the race against BMW and Mercedes with their A6 2.0 TDI. Also: Patrick Dempsey and his racing team at the Grand Am Rolex Sportscar GT series.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: We put the Wiesmann MF5 at the racetrack in Spa-Francochamps in the Belgian Ardennes to the test. Also: Audi A1 vs. Mini Cooper RS. And: the GT Academy 2011 qualifying rounds.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The Nurburgring 24 Hours is considered the most difficult long distance race in motor sports. Volkswagen set themselves this challenge with a car built especially for this occasion, their Golf 24.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The Mercedes-Benz SL 65 AMG is the ultimate German muscle car in a tailor-made suit. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG, the Formula 1 safety car. And: BMW's 6 series models.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: What better way is there to celebrate a stylish and powerful car and a sunny summer day than going for a cruise over the Alps to Italy in a Maserati GranCabrio MC? In addition: a Brit with a fiery temperament, the Jaguar XK-RS convertible with 550 hp. And: Mercedes AMG's SL models, uncompromising performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: On Patrol with the Dubai Police
programme.desc: In a city that loves to show off wealth and luxury, the Dubai police are eager to represent this image via its fleet of patrol cars that includes a Chevrolet Camaro, a Lamborghini Aventador, a Bentley GT, a Ferrari FF, an Aston Martin and a Mercedes SLS. For the first time ever, the Dubai Police Special Cars Unit allowed a television crew to accompany them on their service missions.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aerodynamics crucially influence the performance, track stability and dynamics of a vehicle. We took the Porsche 911 Turbo S, the BMW M6 convertible and the Kelleners 330d to the test and explored the influence of different wings and spoilers.

programme.title: Audi R8 V10 plus
programme.desc: A segunda geração do Audi R8 na versão V10 plus

programme.title: Audi RS7 Sportback Performance
programme.desc: Audi's spearhead of the 7 series, the RS7 Sportback.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: Chevrolet Chevelle und Down Town Garage
programme.desc: Kati and Patrick from Munich are no longer satisfied with their 1972 Chevrolet Chevelle's 5.7-liter small block and want to buy a bigger engine. For that reason they visit the engine specialists from Down Town Garage for a proper conversion.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: Oldtimer Show and Race at Airport
programme.desc: Paaren/Glien near Berlin is host to the yearly Oldtimer Show. Frank and his crew from Special Cars Berlin take their Dragster Camaro to the airfield where high performance cars battle it out in a 1/8 mile race. Will Frank be able to defy the competition?

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: Leonardo Bonucci is keeping the great tradition of Italian central defenders alive. Goran Pandev retires as a legend, and we discover the stars who pay as much attention to their hairstyles as their skills!

programme.title: Top 20

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Canelo Alvarez and Mayweather, Torres' goal and Bannister's four minute mile.

programme.title: Top 20

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Natural Genius
programme.desc: Living creatures have designed an innumerable amount of sharp objects, be they for hunting or defense, or the battle of reproduction or territory. We compare all these tools not only from a morphological stance, which allows us to appreciate form and structure, but also from a functional point of view, highlighting how they occurred, how they are used and what purpose.

programme.title: Water Life

programme.title: Water Life

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let's get ready to ride!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Humans VS Weather
programme.desc: Who will win in a match of a House vs. a Flooded River or a Tornado Chases down some Speedboaters?

programme.title: Science of Thrills
programme.desc: Engineer and adventurer Rob Bell discovers how our fear of falling is exploited by some of the world's top theme park rides.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Parajet, a Hovercraft, a Camo Jacket, and a Portable Military Shelter
programme.desc: As lightweight aluminum is cut and tooled, it will become the frame of a personal flying machine. Used by military operatives, drug enforcement agents, and first responders – it gets you in and out fast, whether you are carrying a camera or a gun.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Sniper Rifle, a Zeppelin, a Ka-Bar Knife, and Dragon Eggs
programme.desc: In 48 hours, a block of metal will be formed into the most accurate weapon on earth: the AX-338 Sniper Rifle. In a warzone, police stand off, or hostage taking, the sniper is often the only solution to a bad situation.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she trains and eats like an astronaut and learns about the dangers and challenges astronauts face when they travel outside our planet.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Join Emily as she gets to know the winner and together, they prepare for space.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050
programme.desc: Host Chuck Pell gets introduced to a 200 pound robot that's almost as graceful as a dancer.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: With the guidance of a local soil scientist, follow Mike's hands-on journey into the art and science of farming sustainably.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: Uncover the multifaceted impact of stress on our well-being, and gain fascinating insights into how various stressors impact our physiological responses.

programme.title: Health Explored
programme.desc: Travel to Tromso to learn about the concept of "Open Air Life" from the inhabitants of this arctic region.

programme.title: Combat Countdown
programme.desc: Whether the fight is on land, sea or air, one factor can be totally decisive. Surprise. Getting the drop on your opponent can win the fight before it's begun. We're counting down the top ten stealthiest war machines across every class of weapon.

programme.title: Combat Countdown
programme.desc: In war, getting, machines men and munitions to the battle-zone is half the fight Power. Wherever the battle is fought, machines that can haul massive loads are critical to success.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: The twins' troop gatecrash a children's birthday party, causing the city monkey catcher to launch a bold campaign to banish the tearaways for good.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: Peace finally reigns at Galta temple as a new alpha male is crowned, but the tranquillity may not last long as Bipin and the twins' troop edge closer to the temple walls.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: Bipin and the terrorizing twins' troop go head-to-head with the Galta Gang, but a dark force neither group had counted on takes sides to even up the score.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is the start of the World's Toughest Sled-Dog Race known as the Iditarod. But there's another canine running wild on these city streets. The urban coyotes cannot resist the Anchorage's sights, smells and constant food supply.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: With more Caribou in Alaska than people, they're the lifeblood of many remote communities. But human expansion, and wild predators, have led to their rapid decline.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: Discover some of Europe's most incredible creatures! Learn why the mongoose is immune to cobra venom, and how the dragonfly uses 80% of its brain just to process what it sees.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home, close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live. In the quest for territorial dominance, a major meerkat standoff resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: Recently Priscilla bought an adopted boy pup from a rival gang to the Gosa Burrow. Unfortunately, his acceptance into the Gosa group was far from ideal. The rest of the gang went out and he was left alone at the burrow, struggling for his life.

programme.title: Bear Whisperer
programme.desc: As tourists fill the resort, Bear Whisperer Steve Searles handles massive black bears, facing danger, tough decisions, and uneasy coexistence.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with an amazing array of sharks at Palau's Blue Corner, shows how sharks adapt in Denver's High-Altitude Aquarium and takes a Deeper Dive with Spiny Dogfish Sharks.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV explores the odd behavior of Hammerhead Sharks, goes on a Blue Hole adventure in Belize featuring a friendly shark, and takes a Deeper Dive to study Scalloped Hammerhead Sharks and Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: School Is in Session
programme.desc: A new client asks for a monster school bus capable of driving over sand and water Redbeard discovers the Mello Yello racecar from the "Days of Thunder" movie and finds the perfect buyer for it.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou modify the hood and floor of a Toyota Rock Racer Jared constructs a set of custom headers.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: The easy availability of spare parts allows Jared and Lou to restore the entire interior of a 1972 Pontiac LeMans GTO convertible.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Trucker's Dream
programme.desc: The team pulls out all the stops for a local trucker with a dream, converting a '34 Oldsmobile sedan into a one-of-a-kind, fully functioning dump truck.

programme.title: All Girls Garage: Military Fix
programme.desc: A wounded veteran that needs help to drive his 2012 Dodge Power Wagon.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: An older and wiser man hopes that his long-abused 1968 Chevelle Malibu can get a second chance at the hands of the Garage Squad.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: Two classic American automobiles, a 1963 Ford Galaxie and a 1966 Ford Mustang, sit in a garage awaiting much-needed overhauls.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage: Dirt-Cheap 1970 Challenger Rescue!
programme.desc: David and Steve have a blast getting an old Dodge 360 running and driving in a gutted old truck now they want to jerk that engine and transplant it into a '70 Challenger that has been off the road since at least 1989.

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: After a devastating engine fire and the onset of some serious health issues, the owner of a 1966 Ford Fairlane dreams of having his beauty rumble back to life.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: School Is in Session
programme.desc: A new client asks for a monster school bus capable of driving over sand and water Redbeard discovers the Mello Yello racecar from the "Days of Thunder" movie and finds the perfect buyer for it.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: They're beautiful - and deadly, with venomous spines that resemble a lion's mane. They're lionfish, a tropical reef species normally found in the Indo-Pacific. Now, they're wreaking havoc in the Caribbean and Atlantic – all thought to have descended from a handful of aquarium fish carelessly released into the sea. In these regions, they are potentially a greater threat to coral reefs and commercial fish populations than global warming or pollution.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Until recently none had ever seen the prickly shark in its natural environment. And of course, Shark Gordon is hot on the scene to check out these mysterious sharks.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Invertebrates include all forms of insects, spiders, scorpions, centipedes and crustations, with nearly 10 million species. In this episode we take a closer look at the survival structure of bees, ants and spiders.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: Blue Iguana Fights Extinction and Wins!
programme.desc: Follow the incredible story of the blue iguana as it defies the odds to survive. Coyote highlights conservation efforts, triumphs, and the resilience of this rare species.

programme.title: SAVED! Prehistoric Bird Escapes Extinction!
programme.desc: Discover how a prehistoric bird species was brought back from the brink of extinction. Coyote explains the science, challenges, and incredible success story of survival.

programme.title: Sting King of the Deep!
programme.desc: Coyote explores the deadly and fascinating world of stingrays in their natural habitat. He showcases their defense mechanisms, hunting techniques, and surprising adaptations.

programme.title: Stung by a Deadly Scorpion!
programme.desc: Mark takes on a deadly scorpion in this tense episode. With pincers and venom, the sting test gets real—and painful—fast.The centipede strikes back! Mark revisits one of his creepiest encounters to see if this many-legged predator will finally deliver a bite.

programme.title: Stung by a Giant Tarantula Hawk!
programme.desc: A Brave Wilderness classic! Mark faces the terrifying sting of the tarantula hawk, one of the most painful insect stings in the world.Scorpion City is no place for the timid. Coyote explores this sting-heavy town and faces its most venomous inhabitants up close.

programme.title: Stung by the Longest Stinger! (Cow Killer Ant)
programme.desc: The cow killer ant lives up to its name with a stinger that's long, venomous, and brutal. Mark takes it on in a painful sting challenge.The desert scorpion's sting may be quick, but the pain lingers. Mark walks viewers through the anatomy and danger of this desert dweller.

programme.title: Bitten by a Tarantula!
programme.desc: Mark gets up close with a giant tarantula. Though terrifying to many, he demonstrates how docile and misunderstood these spiders truly are.Ants attack! Coyote puts his feet directly into a swarm of biting ants and records just how painful and rapid their assault can be.

programme.title: Zombie Toads Rise from the Desert!
programme.desc: Zombie toads rise! Mark uncovers a strange desert phenomenon that brings seemingly dead amphibians back to life after heavy rains.Killer bees aren't just a legend. Coyote cracks open a hive to show how aggressive—and fascinating—these insects really are.

programme.title: Beaded Lizard vs. Gila Monster!
programme.desc: Beaded lizard vs. Gila monster. Coyote compares these venomous reptiles in a desert showdown, highlighting their bite strength and venom use.One of the world's most dangerous stings comes from the killer bee. Coyote gets stung and breaks down their behavior and threat level.

programme.title: Cactus Maze Runner!
programme.desc: Mark enters a twisting maze filled with cactus spines. One wrong move means pain, so he's got to think fast—and duck low.This spider might bite—but will it? Coyote examines the risk and anatomy of a feared species in this myth-busting episode.

programme.title: Did I Catch the Deadliest Snake in America?
programme.desc: Coyote may have caught the deadliest snake in the U.S. He examines its venom, behavior, and what makes it so feared among experts.Handling a black widow spider sounds insane, but Coyote does it to test bite behavior and safety protocols. Proceed with caution!

programme.title: Sucked by Tiger Leeches!
programme.desc: Leeches attack in this jungle trek! Mark shows how tiger leeches feed and what it takes to remove them once they latch on.In the aftermath of wildfires, koalas need help. Coyote joins a rescue team in Australia to treat, care for, and rehome injured marsupials.

programme.title: Stung by a Stonefish! (Rare Freshwater Version)
programme.desc: A rare freshwater stonefish delivers one of the most painful stings Mark has ever endured. It's both risky and riveting.The thorny devil lizard is covered in spikes and full of surprises. Mark explores its desert defenses and water-collecting superpowers.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Puglia's lush landscape and large coastline characterize its cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini explores its native ingredients through some of Puglia's favourite meals. First up, Michael's antipasto is a guaranteed crunchy bite with crispy Fried Mussels. Stepping away from the sea, Michael highlights Puglia's prize crop: tomatoes! Combining colourful tomatoes with flavourful burrata cheese, Michael cooks up comfort in a bowl with his Tomato and Burrata Risotto. Taking on a more festive flair, Michael introduces us to Little Pork Bombs, the hottest street food in Puglia. With a filling of fresh herbs and melted cheese, these pork skewers are savoury and irresistible. Then, Michael introduces a classic Father's Day dessert for his dulce: Sour Cherry-on-Top Fritters. A dessert for strolling the street, Michal's crispy golden fritters topped with light mascarpone whipped cream will have you whipping them up at home as well!

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled up to contain a mouth-watering mixture of mozzarella, provolone, and pecorino romano, this dish gets an extra kick of flavour from a coating of breadcrumbs and tomato sauce. To bring it all together, Michael combines spicy with sweet through his tender Spiced Chocolate Cookies.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen shows how salads can be a tasty main AND served warm with a grilled romaine salad.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI TAKES THE STATES 2022 hits the road for another epic adventure
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.desc: Automotions

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology - Colour change with the power of thought - The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range_en
programme.sub-title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Four Corners
